description: Milestone 7: Real Todo API Integration. Extends the meine-piraten.de Rails server with status/assignee fields and comments, documents the API, aligns the iOS domain model to the real server schema, builds the real API client and repository, and wires everything together replacing the fake implementation.

userStories.title: Document the meine-piraten.de API
userStories.description: Create docs/API_OVERVIEW.md in the server repo documenting all existing endpoints, request/response formats, and the schema.
acceptanceCriteria: All 3 resources (Tasks, Entities, Categories) documented with endpoints, HTTP methods, request params, and response JSON shapes
Schema tables listed with all columns and types
Document notes 'no authentication' as current state

userStories.title: Add status and assignee to tasks
userStories.description: Add status (string, default 'open') and assignee (string, nullable) columns to the tasks table. Update controller permitted params, jbuilder template, and model validations.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration adds status (string, default 'open') and assignee (string, nullable) to tasks
task_params permits :status and :assignee
Jbuilder includes both fields in JSON output
Model validates status inclusion in ['open', 'claimed', 'done']
docs/API_OVERVIEW.md updated with new fields

userStories.title: Add comments model and REST API
userStories.description: Create a Comment model (belongs_to :task) with nested REST endpoints under tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates comments table with task_id (foreign key), author_name, text, timestamps
Comments are nested under tasks in routes
Task has_many :comments, dependent: :destroy
CRUD works via JSON endpoints (index, create, destroy)
API_OVERVIEW.md updated with comment endpoints

userStories.title: Align iOS domain model to server schema
userStories.description: Restructure the iOS Todo domain model to match the real server schema. Remove OwnerType/Priority enums, add entityId/categoryId/urgent/activityPoints/timeNeededInHours/creatorName. Create Entity and TodoCategory domain models. Update TodoRepository protocol, FakeTodoRepository, and all views/viewmodels.
acceptanceCriteria: OwnerType and Priority enums removed
Todo struct has entityId, categoryId, urgent, activityPoints, timeNeededInHours, creatorName
Entity and TodoCategory domain models exist
TodoRepository has fetchEntities() and fetchCategories() methods
createTodo takes entityId/categoryId instead of ownerType/ownerName
FakeTodoRepository updated with fake entities/categories
All views compile and display correctly with fake data
Build passes, tests pass

userStories.title: Create DTOs and TodoAPIClient
userStories.description: Create data transfer objects matching the Rails JSON responses and an API client following the DiscourseAPIClient pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: TaskDTO, EntityDTO, CategoryDTO, CommentDTO — all Decodable with CodingKeys for snake_case
Each DTO has a toDomainModel() method returning the domain struct
TodoAPIClient follows DiscourseAPIClient pattern (HTTPClient injection, returns Data, error mapping)
Base URL configurable via xcconfig
Build passes

userStories.title: Create RealTodoRepository
userStories.description: Implement RealTodoRepository that satisfies the TodoRepository protocol using TodoAPIClient.
acceptanceCriteria: RealTodoRepository implements all TodoRepository methods
Uses TodoAPIClient for HTTP, decodes DTOs, maps to domain
Error mapping from API errors to TodoError
Build passes

userStories.title: Wire RealTodoRepository in AppContainer
userStories.description: Replace FakeTodoRepository with RealTodoRepository in AppContainer production init. Keep fake available for previews and tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Production AppContainer uses RealTodoRepository
Test AppContainer still uses FakeTodoRepository
Base URL read from Info.plist (set via xcconfig)
Build passes, tests pass
Q-003 resolved in OPEN_QUESTIONS.md
